summary_en: Tender offer by World Holdings to acquire all nms Holdings shares (excluding treasury stock and World's existing 6.32M shares at 32.91% S/O). Tender price ¥540/share. Minimum acceptance 6.48M shares (66.67% post-acquisition ownership). Offer period June 1 – July 10, 2026 (30 business days). No upper limit on shares tendered. Board recommends tender; major shareholder Fumitoshi Ono (18.73%) has committed all shares.
title_en: Notice of Commencement of Tender Offer for nms Holdings Co., Ltd. (Ticker: 2162)
translation_en_brief: World Holdings announced on May 29, 2026 its decision to launch a tender offer for all ordinary shares of nms Holdings Co., Ltd. (TSE Standard Market, ticker 2162), excluding nms Holdings' treasury shares and World Holdings' existing stake. World Holdings currently owns 6.32 million nms shares (32.91% of the reference share count of 19.2 million shares, after adjusting for treasury stock). The tender offer will run from June 1 through July 10, 2026 (30 business days) at ¥540 per share. The minimum acceptance threshold is 6.48 million shares, which would result in World Holdings holding 66.67% post-acquisition ownership. World has set no upper limit on shares tendered. The offer is structured as part of a broader transaction to acquire 100% of nms Holdings and make it a wholly owned subsidiary. The nms Holdings board has agreed to recommend the tender, and Fumitoshi Ono, the second-largest shareholder holding 18.73%, has committed contractually to tender his entire stake. Investment funds JAIC Supply Chain Fund and Governance Partners Management Fund have also executed commitment letters to tender their combined 1.11 million shares.
